scripts.compile: npx hardhat clean && npx hardhat compile
scripts.deploy:local: rm -rf artifacts cache ignition/deployments && export HARDHAT_IGNITION_CONFIRM_DEPLOYMENT=false && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Deploy.ts --network localhost --show-stack-traces
scripts.deploy:prod: rm -rf artifacts cache ignition/deployments && export HARDHAT_IGNITION_CONFIRM_DEPLOYMENT=false && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Deploy.ts --network production --show-stack-traces
